series_metadata.series_title: Unemployment Compensation Review Commission (UCRC) Meeting Minutes
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain minutes from weekly commission meetings. Attendees include members of the UCRC executive leadership team. The minutes include, but is not limited to an agenda, meeting log, commission minutes and documents submitted during service improvement discussions. Discussion centers around case conflicts, customer service issues, and recommendations for improvements.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 3 years.. ; Paper: Retain in office 3 years, then transfer to records center for permanent storage., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Permanent
